name: Theron Lightbringer
title: The Wandering Sage

physical_description.eyes: Deep green eyes that sparkle with wisdom
physical_description.clothing: Blue traveling robes with silver trim

catchphrases: The path of wisdom is never straight

backstory.origin: Former professor at the Academy of Ethereal Arts
backstory.motivation: Seeks to preserve ancient knowledge before it's lost
backstory.journey: Travels between towns teaching and learning
backstory.secrets: Guards the location of hidden magical libraries

relationships.locals: Welcomed in most towns for his healing knowledge
relationships.rivals: Opposed by those who hoard magical knowledge

goals: Establish a network of knowledge keepers
Find and protect ancient magical texts
Train the next generation of ethical mages
